'''âb-y-v''' ('''bayava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flexibilize|flexibilize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flexibilize|flexibilize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| bayava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayavithi|bayavithi]] || [[word:bayaviji|bayaviji]] || [[word:bayavishi|bayavishi]] || [[word:bayavi|bayavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayavuthuth|bayavuthuth]] || [[word:bayavujuj|bayavujuj]] || [[word:bayavushush|bayavushush]] || [[word:bayav|bayav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayavuthu|bayavuthu]] || [[word:bayavuju|bayavuju]] || [[word:bayavushu|bayavushu]] || [[word:bayavu|bayavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayavufuth|bayavufuth]] || [[word:bayavufuj|bayavufuj]] || [[word:bayavufush|bayavufush]] || [[word:bayavuf|bayavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayavethe|bayavethe]] || [[word:bayaveje|bayaveje]] || [[word:bayaveshe|bayaveshe]] || [[word:bayave|bayave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayavothoth|bayavothoth]] || [[word:bayavojoj|bayavojoj]] || [[word:bayavoshosh|bayavoshosh]] || [[word:bayav|bayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayavotho|bayavotho]] || [[word:bayavojo|bayavojo]] || [[word:bayavosho|bayavosho]] || [[word:bayavo|bayavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayavofoth|bayavofoth]] || [[word:bayavofoj|bayavofoj]] || [[word:bayavofosh|bayavofosh]] || [[word:bayavof|bayavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayavĂŠthĂŠ|bayavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bayavĂŠjĂŠ|bayavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bayavĂŠshĂŠ|bayavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bayavĂŠ|bayavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayavathath|bayavathath]] || [[word:bayavajaj|bayavajaj]] || [[word:bayavashash|bayavashash]] || [[word:bayav|bayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayavatha|bayavatha]] || [[word:bayavaja|bayavaja]] || [[word:bayavasha|bayavasha]] || [[word:bayava|bayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayavafath|bayavafath]] || [[word:bayavafaj|bayavafaj]] || [[word:bayavafash|bayavafash]] || [[word:bayavaf|bayavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bayavasha|bayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobayavasha|gobayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibayavasha|gokibayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bayavnĂŒsha|bayavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobayavnknĂŒsha|gobayavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibayavnĂŒsha|gokibayavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bayavshĂ«sha|bayavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobayavnkshĂ«sha|gobayavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibayavshĂ«sha|gokibayavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayavrosha|bayavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayavnkrosha|gobayavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayavrosha|gokibayavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bayavmusha|bayavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayavnkmusha|gobayavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayavmusha|gokibayavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bayavsherasha|bayavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobayavnksherasha|gobayavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibayavsherasha|gokibayavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bayavngasha|bayavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobayavnkngasha|gobayavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibayavngasha|gokibayavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bayavyasha|bayavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobayavnkyasha|gobayavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibayavyasha|gokibayavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bayavyamasha|bayavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobayavnkyamasha|gobayavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibayavyamasha|gokibayavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayavnĂŒshĂ«sha|bayavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobayavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibayavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayavnĂŒrosha|bayavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayavnknĂŒrosha|gobayavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayavnĂŒrosha|gokibayavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayavnĂŒmusha|bayavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayavnknĂŒmusha|gobayavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayavnĂŒmusha|gokibayavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayavshĂ«nĂŒsha|bayavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobayavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibayavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayavshĂ«rosha|bayavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayavnkshĂ«rosha|gobayavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayavshĂ«rosha|gokibayavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayavshĂ«musha|bayavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayavnkshĂ«musha|gobayavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayavshĂ«musha|gokibayavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayavronĂŒsha|bayavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayavnkronĂŒsha|gobayavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayavronĂŒsha|gokibayavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayavroshĂ«sha|bayavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayavnkroshĂ«sha|gobayavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayavroshĂ«sha|gokibayavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayavromusha|bayavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayavnkromusha|gobayavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayavromusha|gokibayavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bayavmunĂŒsha|bayavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobayavnkmunĂŒsha|gobayavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibayavmunĂŒsha|gokibayavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bayavmushĂ«sha|bayavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobayavnkmushĂ«sha|gobayavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibayavmushĂ«sha|gokibayavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bayavmurosha|bayavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobayavnkmurosha|gobayavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibayavmurosha|gokibayavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bayav|bayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠv|bĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobayav|hobayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠyĂŠv|hobĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobayav|hohobayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠyĂŠv|hohobĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbayav|nĂŒbayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŒbĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbayav|nĂŒnĂŒbayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbayav|nĂŻbayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŻbĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbayav|nĂŻnĂŻbayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubayav|lubayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠyĂŠv|lubĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubayav|lulubayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠyĂŠv|lulubĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libayav|libayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠyĂŠv|libĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibayav|lilibayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠyĂŠv|lilibĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobayav|kobayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠyĂŠv|kobĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobayav|kokobayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠyĂŠv|kokobĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebayav|kebayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠyĂŠv|kebĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebayav|kekebayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠyĂŠv|kekebĂŠyĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
